phase: Phase E - Release Verification, Monitoring, And Growth Handoff
current_phase: Phase E - Release Verification, Monitoring, And Growth Handoff
current_work: E-1 - Figma Make Preview Verification And Patch-State Ledger
decision: Phase E may begin at E-1 because Phase A through Phase D are closed with blockers carried. Phase E cannot close, and Mitra Auto cannot be classified release-ready or growth-ready, until live runtime evidence, browser smoke, drift baseline, provider/platform readbacks, Figma Make parity, and owner-approved exceptions are recorded.

stage_gate_policy.exception_policy: Critical or blocker findings require fix or owner-approved exception with rationale, mitigation, monitoring, and expiry. Missing provider/platform access is unavailable evidence, not a pass.

evidence_modes_entering_phase_e.basis: Current board, D-1 through D-5 evidence, and local source gates exist. Uncommitted local changes and Figma Make sync still require E-1 ledgering.
Recent local builds pass with existing large-chunk warning. Final release build/preview parity is not yet recorded in Phase E.
Phase B/D evidence reports production robots, sitemap, Merchant feed, product sitemap, private route, redirect, soft-404, and raw HTML issues on www.
No current Phase E browser smoke has been run for Figma Make preview or live production.
Project wrapper lacks Cloudflare, Search Console, GBP, Merchant Center, GA4, public base URL, logs, and field-performance metadata.
D-5 source hardening and claim guard exist; owner proof and media/service reviewer evidence remain unavailable.
D-4 source event semantics are hardened; analytics readback, finance definitions, server outcome exports, and privacy/legal approval remain unavailable.
Local route migration checks pass, but production old URL redirects, opaque product identifier redirects, soft-404 behavior, and sitemap/feed deployment parity remain unproven or blocked.
No live traffic-drop or release incident dataset exists; E-4 must produce incident triggers, owners, and runbook.

known_entry_blockers.blocker: Figma Make preview parity is not verified and may still be stale relative to local source.
Production static SEO assets, Merchant feed, product sitemaps, private route denial, redirects, soft-404 policy, and raw HTML route metadata are not proven on the live host.
Cloudflare, Search Console, GBP, Merchant Center, analytics, logs, and field Core Web Vitals readbacks are unavailable.
Owner proof is unavailable for GBP/citation facts, service availability, product policy, reviews/ratings, media, legal/privacy, and finance definitions.
No current Phase E browser/accessibility/customer journey smoke exists for preview or production.
No current drift baseline, monitoring owner handoff, launch annotation, alert thresholds, or incident runbook exists for this board.

task_entry_plan.name: Figma Make Preview Verification And Patch-State Ledger
task_entry_plan.preimplementation_requirement: List only /Figma/src files under src/**, confirm current source sync state, smoke preview routes if a URL is available, and keep provider/static assets out of Figma sync lists.

task_entry_plan.name: Production Crawl, Rendered Head, Schema, And Browser Matrix
task_entry_plan.preimplementation_requirement: Bound live crawl scope, verify raw HTTP and rendered browser evidence separately, and classify provider/platform gaps as unavailable.

task_entry_plan.name: Accessibility, SXO, Checkout, And Customer Journey Smoke
task_entry_plan.preimplementation_requirement: Run non-destructive browser smoke for booking/contact/product/cart/checkout and record keyboard, mobile, focus, labels, errors, visible terms, and recovery state.

task_entry_plan.name: Drift Baseline, Monitoring, Incident Runbook, And Owners
task_entry_plan.preimplementation_requirement: Create sanitized baseline and incident/monitoring handoff without raw customer/authenticated data.

task_entry_plan.name: Final Growth Readiness Classification And Board Wrap-Up
task_entry_plan.preimplementation_requirement: Reconcile all phase closeouts and blockers; do not let a score or local pass hide a release blocker.

preimplementation_rules: Do not mark live, browser, provider, platform, owner, or field-performance evidence as passed from local source checks.
Use safe bounded live checks only; no destructive checkout, booking, account, admin, or provider writes without an explicit task and owner approval.
Use the project wrapper before backend/provider checks and print only redacted set/missing statuses for secrets.
Do not write secrets, tokens, private response bodies, customer data, raw authenticated pages, or private URLs into .growth-work or .seo-work.
Record every carried blocker with owner, verification method, dependency, and exception expiry if the owner chooses not to fix it before launch.
Do not classify Mitra Auto as growth-ready until Gate D launch evidence and Gate E measurement/monitoring evidence are both satisfied.
next_task: E-1 - Figma Make Preview Verification And Patch-State Ledger
no_guarantee_statement: Phase E can improve release evidence, implementation quality, monitoring, and handoff discipline. It cannot guarantee crawling, indexing, selected canonicals, rankings, rich results, local-pack visibility, Merchant approval, traffic, conversions, revenue, ROI, or AI citations.
